name: Pickled Okra
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and prepare fresh okra.
2. Place half a tablespoon of dill seed in the bottom of each sterilized quart jar.
3. Pack the washed okra tightly into each jar, being careful not to bruise it.
4. Add half a tablespoon of dill seed, one hot green pepper, one hot red pepper, and one clove of garlic to each jar.
5. Bring a mixture of boiling vinegar, water, and salt to a boil.
6. Pour the hot mixture over the okra in each jar, ensuring it is fully covered.
7. Seal the jars tightly.
8. Allow the jars to stand for two weeks before serving the pickled okra icy cold.
